admission.remarks:
1. The calculated score should be used as a reference only. It is not guaranteed your eligibility for admission even though you attain the same or a higher score when comparing with that of previous years. **Please check against the entrance requirement of individual programmes for your eligibility for admission at [Study@PolyU](/study)**. 2. An attainment at "Attained" in "Citizenship and Social Development" is required for meeting the entrance requirement but NOT included in the admission score calculation. 3. For HKDSE repeaters who took "Liberal Studies" in 2023/24 or before and have not taken "Citizenship and Social Development" in 2024/25 and thereafter, "Level 2" or above in "Liberal Studies" would be regarded as "Attained" in "Citizenship and Social Development" for fulfilling the general entrance requirement. However, "Liberal Studies" would not be recognized for meeting the elective requirement of the general entrance requirement in 2024/25 and thereafter. The level attainment of the subject would not be included in the admission score calculation. 4.
